name_en: CELIN* Upgraded Triomphe Tofu Bag 187366_Full Leather Caramel. Made of imported cowhide with pure sheepskin lining and steel hardware. A new definition of the Triomphe concept, adding Parisian elements, vintage style, noble temperament, recognized by the fashion world again. A favorite among many stars. Classic reinvented, reshaping the classic with exquisite buckle design. Very in line with fashion trends✔️
name_cn:
